checks.name: view_presentation_safety
checks.description: viewPresentation only allowed if principal is owner, in editors, or in viewers (with job=internal for InternalPrezViewActions path, or any job for ExternalPrezViewActions path)

checks.name: duplicate_presentation_safety
checks.description: duplicatePresentation only allowed if principal is owner, in editors, or (job=internal AND in viewers)

checks.name: edit_presentation_safety
checks.description: editPresentation only allowed if principal is owner or in editors

checks.name: grant_view_presentation_safety
checks.description: grantViewAccessToPresentation only if (owner or editor) AND (target is not customer OR (principal is distributor with same customerId))

checks.name: grant_edit_presentation_safety
checks.description: grantEditAccessToPresentation only if (owner or editor) AND target.job == internal

checks.name: remove_self_presentation_safety
checks.description: removeSelfAccessFromPresentation only if principal is owner, in editors, or in viewers (with internal for InternalPrezView, or any for ExternalPrezView)

checks.name: view_template_safety
checks.description: viewTemplate only if owner, in editors, in editorMarkets, (internal AND in viewers), or in viewerMarkets; subject to unapproved restriction for non-internal on edit/market paths

checks.name: duplicate_template_safety
checks.description: duplicateTemplate only allowed via TemplateEditActions (owner/editor/editorMarket), InternalTemplateViewActions (internal+viewer), or MarketTemplateViewActions (viewerMarkets); unapproved restriction applies to non-internal on edit and market paths

checks.name: edit_template_safety
checks.description: editTemplate only if owner, in editors, or in editorMarkets; unapproved forbid blocks non-internal

checks.name: grant_view_template_safety
checks.description: grantViewAccessToTemplate only if (owner/editor/editorMarket) AND not forbidden by customer restriction AND not forbidden by unapproved restriction for non-internal

checks.name: grant_edit_template_safety
checks.description: grantEditAccessToTemplate only if (owner/editor/editorMarket) AND (no targetUser OR targetUser.job==internal) AND not forbidden by unapproved restriction for non-internal

checks.name: remove_self_template_safety
checks.description: removeSelfAccessFromTemplate only if owner, in editors, in editorMarkets (with approval gate for non-internal), or (internal AND in viewers)

checks.name: remove_others_template_safety
checks.description: removeOthersAccessToTemplate only if owner, in editors, or in editorMarkets; unapproved forbid blocks non-internal

checks.name: floor_external_viewer_view_presentation
checks.description: A user in resource.viewers MUST be able to viewPresentation (external view path)

checks.name: floor_owner_edit_presentation
checks.description: The owner of a presentation MUST be able to editPresentation

checks.name: floor_internal_viewer_duplicate_presentation
checks.description: An internal user in viewers MUST be able to duplicatePresentation

checks.name: floor_owner_view_template_approved
checks.description: The owner of an approved template MUST be able to viewTemplate

checks.name: floor_market_viewer_view_approved_template
checks.description: A user in viewerMarkets MUST be able to viewTemplate on approved templates

checks.name: floor_internal_editor_unapproved_template
checks.description: An internal user who is owner/editor/editorMarket MUST be able to editTemplate even on unapproved templates

checks.name: liveness_viewPresentation
checks.description: viewPresentation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_editPresentation
checks.description: editPresentation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_duplicatePresentation
checks.description: duplicatePresentation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_grantViewPresentation
checks.description: grantViewAccessToPresentation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_grantEditPresentation
checks.description: grantEditAccessToPresentation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_viewTemplate
checks.description: viewTemplate is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_editTemplate
checks.description: editTemplate is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_grantViewTemplate
checks.description: grantViewAccessToTemplate is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_grantEditTemplate
checks.description: grantEditAccessToTemplate is not trivially deny-all

results.description: viewPresentation only allowed if principal is owner, in editors, or in viewers (with job=internal for InternalPrezViewActions path, or any job for ExternalPrezViewActions path)

editPresentation only allowed if principal is owner or in editors
grantViewAccessToPresentation only if (owner or editor) AND (target is not customer OR (principal is distributor with same customerId))
grantEditAccessToPresentation only if (owner or editor) AND target.job == internal
removeSelfAccessFromPresentation only if principal is owner, in editors, or in viewers (with internal for InternalPrezView, or any for ExternalPrezView)
viewTemplate only if owner, in editors, in editorMarkets, (internal AND in viewers), or in viewerMarkets; subject to unapproved restriction for non-internal on edit/market paths

duplicateTemplate only allowed via TemplateEditActions (owner/editor/editorMarket), InternalTemplateViewActions (internal+viewer), or MarketTemplateViewActions (viewerMarkets); unapproved restriction applies to non-internal on edit and market paths
editTemplate only if owner, in editors, or in editorMarkets; unapproved forbid blocks non-internal
grantViewAccessToTemplate only if (owner/editor/editorMarket) AND not forbidden by customer restriction AND not forbidden by unapproved restriction for non-internal
grantEditAccessToTemplate only if (owner/editor/editorMarket) AND (no targetUser OR targetUser.job==internal) AND not forbidden by unapproved restriction for non-internal

removeOthersAccessToTemplate only if owner, in editors, or in editorMarkets; unapproved forbid blocks non-internal

An internal user in viewers MUST be able to duplicatePresentation
The owner of an approved template MUST be able to viewTemplate
A user in viewerMarkets MUST be able to viewTemplate on approved templates
An internal user who is owner/editor/editorMarket MUST be able to editTemplate even on unapproved templates
